name: @narada2/mcp-registrar
description: MCP surface registrar for binding/unbinding surfaces across Narada sites and carriers (opencode, Kimi, Codex).

scripts.test: pnpm --filter @narada2/mcp-runtime-proxy build && pnpm --filter @narada2/local-filesystem-mcp build && pnpm --filter @narada2/mailbox-mcp build && pnpm build && node dist/test/mcp-registrar.test.js && node dist/test/protocol-smoke.test.js
